wizard.title: Deploy Your Paymaster

substep1.title: Connect Your Wallet
substep1.description: Please connect your MetaMask wallet to get started. Make sure you're on the correct network.
substep1.connectPrompt: Please connect your MetaMask wallet to get started
substep1.connectHint: Make sure you have MetaMask installed and are on the correct network

substep2.title: Choose Your Deployment Mode
substep2.description: Select the deployment mode that best fits your needs.

modeNames.standardSubtitle: AOA (Asset Oriented Abstraction) optimizes traditional ERC-4337 by eliminating off-chain signature servers and on-chain verify cost.
modeNames.superSubtitle: Based on AOA, supports custom gas token and no individual contract deployment needed.

substep3.title: Verify Resource Requirements
substep3.description: Based on your selection, verify that you have the necessary resources.
substep3.notReady: Please ensure all required resources are met

eth.title: ETH Balance
eth.faucetNote: Please get Sepolia ETH from faucet

summary.allReadyDescription: You can proceed to the next step to complete the deployment.
summary.notReadyDescription: Please complete the missing resource deployments above, then click "Re-detect".

registerCommunity.subtitle: Create and register your community on the AAstar Network

form.allowPermissionlessMintHint: When enabled, users can mint community MySBT without invitation
form.unifiedMySBT: All communities use unified MySBT white-label SBT

getGToken.description: Get protocol access permission GToken, become protocol member, join permissionless, quit anytime freely

operationGuide.title: Community Operator Guide

overview.title: Community Operator Guide
overview.description: SuperPaymaster provides a complete toolset for community operators to build a prosperous Web3 community economy.

lowerBarrier.title: Lower Participation Barrier
lowerBarrier.description: Members don't need to hold ETH to participate in on-chain activities, increasing community engagement

createValue.title: Create Economic Value
createValue.description: Transform gas costs into community revenue, building a sustainable economic model

positiveCycle.title: Form Positive Cycle
positiveCycle.description: Task-points-consumption loop incentivizes continuous member contributions

register.title: Register Community
register.description: Register your community on-chain with basic information and governance tokens

deploy.title: Deploy Tokens

launch.title: Launch Paymaster

footer.title: Need More Help?

page.title: Operator Onboarding
page.subtitle: Become a gas sponsor on the AAStar network — choose self-hosted (AOA) or shared (AOA+).
page.reconnectPrompt: Reconnect your wallet to continue onboarding.

step1.title: Connect wallet & choose mode
step1.description: Operator transactions are signed in your own browser wallet on Sepolia.

aoa.title: AOA — Self-hosted Paymaster
aoa.subtitle: Run your own Paymaster V4 node
aoa.bullet1: Deploy & register a dedicated Paymaster V4
aoa.bullet2: Stake 30 GT (+30 GT to register community)
aoa.bullet3: Fund the paymaster on EntryPoint with ETH
aoa.bullet4: Full control, you maintain the node

aoaPlus.title: AOA+ — Shared SuperPaymaster
aoaPlus.subtitle: Use the protocol SuperPaymaster
aoaPlus.bullet1: No node to deploy or maintain
aoaPlus.bullet2: Stake 50 GT (+30 GT to register community)

step2.title: Resource pre-check
step2.topUpHint: Top up the missing balances, then click Refresh. On-chain state that is already satisfied will be skipped automatically in the next steps.

step3.title: Register community
step3.description: Stake GToken and register ROLE_COMMUNITY on the Registry.
step3.alreadyHolds: This wallet already holds ROLE_COMMUNITY — skipping.
step3.explainerPrefix: Approves GToken to GTokenStaking (only if needed) then calls
step3.explainerSuffix: . Stake amount is read from the role config on-chain.

step4.title: Deploy xPNTs token
step4.description: Your community's gas token, deployed through the protocol factory.

step5Paymaster.title: Deploy & register Paymaster V4
step5Paymaster.description: Deploy your own AOA paymaster node and register ROLE_PAYMASTER_AOA.
step5Paymaster.explainer: One-stop deploy: predicts the paymaster address, deploys the V4 proxy via the factory, and registers it on the Registry with a 30 GT stake.

step5Super.title: Register on SuperPaymaster
step5Super.description: Stake 50 GT and register ROLE_PAYMASTER_SUPER on the shared SuperPaymaster.
step5Super.explainer: One-stop API: verifies ROLE_COMMUNITY, approves GToken to GTokenStaking, and registers ROLE_PAYMASTER_SUPER with the 50 GT stake.

step6Configure.title: Configure operator
step6Configure.description: Bind your xPNTs token, treasury, and exchange rate on the SuperPaymaster.
step6Configure.noXpnts: No xPNTs token address available. Complete the xPNTs deploy step first.

step6Entrypoint.title: Fund paymaster on EntryPoint
step6Entrypoint.description: Deposit ETH so your paymaster can sponsor user operations.
step6Entrypoint.noPaymaster: No paymaster address available. Complete the deploy step first.

step7Apnts.title: Deposit aPNTs collateral
step7Apnts.description: Fund your SuperPaymaster balance so you can sponsor user operations.

complete.title: Onboarding complete
complete.description: Your {{mode}} operator setup is live on Sepolia.
complete.aoaSummary: Your paymaster is funded on the EntryPoint and ready to sponsor gas.
complete.aoaPlusSummary: Your SuperPaymaster collateral is funded and your operator is configured.

hub.title: Operator Management
hub.subtitle: Manage your community xPNTs token and run day-to-day paymaster operations.
hub.xpntsDescription: Deploy your community points token or mint points to users.
hub.paymasterDescription: PaymasterV4 status, EntryPoint top-up and configuration.
hub.superDescription: Shared SuperPaymaster operator account and aPNTs collateral.

shared.connectPrompt: Connect your operator wallet to manage on-chain resources.
shared.noWallet: No injected wallet found. Install MetaMask or a compatible wallet.

xpnts.title: xPNTs Token
xpnts.deployPrompt: Your community has no xPNTs token yet. Deploy one to start issuing points.
xpnts.name: Name
xpnts.onlyOwnerCanMint: Only the token owner ({{owner}}) can mint. Your wallet is {{wallet}}.

paymaster.title: AOA Paymaster
paymaster.noPaymasterDescription: This operator has not deployed a PaymasterV4 yet. Deploy one from the operator deploy flow first, then return here to manage it.
paymaster.notOwnerWarning: Your wallet ({{wallet}}) is not the paymaster owner ({{owner}}). Configuration changes will revert. EntryPoint top-up is permissionless.
paymaster.topUpPrompt: Deposit ETH into the EntryPoint for this paymaster (anyone can fund).
paymaster.errFeeRate: Enter a fee rate in basis points.

super.title: AOA+ SuperPaymaster
super.notConfiguredNotice: This operator is not yet configured on the SuperPaymaster. Complete AOA+ registration (deploy flow) first; this page manages the account once configured.
super.topUpPrompt: Approve (if needed) and deposit aPNTs collateral so the SuperPaymaster can keep sponsoring your community's gas. Wallet balance: {{balance}} aPNTs.

rolePage.title: Role Portal
rolePage.subtitle: View your role in the AAStar ecosystem and navigate to role-specific dashboards
rolePage.noRolesTitle: No roles found for this address
rolePage.noRolesHint: Purchase GToken to register a role
rolePage.queryError: Failed to query role for address

communityPage.title: Community Portal
communityPage.noTokenDesc: Deploy your community token via the xPNTs factory to enable loyalty points for your members.
communityPage.registerDescPrefix: To become a Community Admin, stake 30 GToken on the Registry contract. You need the
communityPage.registerDescSuffix: role. Connect your EOA wallet to proceed.

salePage.title: Token Sale
salePage.eligibleMsg: You are eligible to buy GTokens
salePage.gtokenNotConfigured: GToken sale contract not configured. Set {{env}} in env.
salePage.apntsNotConfigured: aPNTs sale contract not configured. Set {{env}} in env.

onboard.title: Onboard a Community
onboard.desc: Register your community and deploy a Paymaster (AOA / AOA+), step by step.

manage.title: Manage Operations
manage.desc: Manage xPNTs, top up your Paymaster, and view operator status.

operatorDashboard.title: Operator Portal
operatorDashboard.registerSpoStep3: Deposit aPNTs to SuperPaymaster via depositFor
operatorDashboard.registerSpoStep4: Call configureOperator with xPNTs token + treasury + exchange rate

tokensPage.title: Tokens
tokensPage.subtitle: Get the two Mycelium tokens — gaslessly. GToken is your Digital Public Goods ticket (governance & participation); aPNTs is the Utility Computing Unit that powers gasless service (pays your gas via SuperPaymaster). Pay with USDC and the relayer covers gas (free), or self-pay with USDC / USDT (you have ETH in your account).
tokensPage.gaslessDesc: Pay with USDC — 2 wallet signatures (no tx), the relayer pays gas for you.
tokensPage.selfpayDesc: You pay ETH gas: approve + buy (real txs). Choose USDC or USDT.
tokensPage.selfpayNote: Self-pay credits the paying wallet ({{addr}}). To deliver into your AirAccount, use Gasless (USDC).
tokensPage.switchSepolia: Please switch your wallet to Sepolia
tokensPage.signing: Sign in your wallet (no tx, relayer pays gas)…
tokensPage.amountTooSmall: Amount too small — increase it to buy at least 1 token
tokensPage.dvtRelays: Relayed by {{online}}/{{total}} independent DVT nodes — no ETH needed
tokensPage.saleNotOnNetwork: Sale not live on {{network}} yet — use Sepolia (testnet)

guardPage.title: Spending Guard
guardPage.subtitle: Your account's on-chain spending policy — daily limits, per-token tiers, and strict mode. Changes can only tighten (lower limits, add token configs).
guardPage.noAccount: Create an account first to manage its spending guard.
guardPage.noGuard: This account has no spending guard (it was created without a daily limit).
guardPage.monotonicHint: Can only decrease, and not below the floor.
guardPage.onlyDecrease: The guard only allows lowering the limit.
guardPage.strictOnDisable: Strict mode ON — tap to disable
guardPage.strictOffEnable: Strict mode OFF — tap to enable (block unconfigured tokens)
guardPage.tokenReadFailed: Failed to read the token's guard config
guardPage.notConfigured: This token has no config yet. Add tier limits (add-only — can't edit later).
